creator: alexis.praga@proton.me
text:
Yes, I have received the warnings. 
On my machine, with 13.1 and poudriere, I had the same issue but the jail in poudriere was somewhat not in sync. Removing and re-creating the jail solved the issue on my machine.

A temporary fix is to replace "static_assert" with "_Static_assert". I’m not sure if that is the propery way to fix this...
